message:
Convert string comparisons to StaticStringMap for DCE + fix WASM mode

DCE optimizations:
- method_calls.zig: 57 mem.eql → 4 StaticStringMaps (String/List/Dict/Pandas methods)
- allocator_analyzer.zig: 33 mem.eql → 4 StaticStringMaps
- builtins.zig: 26 mem.eql → 1 BuiltinMap
- module_functions.zig: 25 mem.eql → 2-level ModuleMap lookup

WASM fix:
- Set script mode for --wasm flag (generates pub fn main)
- Zig's std.start auto-exports _start for freestanding targets

Total: 141 string comparisons converted to O(1) lookups
